# RoofVue — Independent Roof Surveys, Kent, United Kingdom

> RoofVue is an independent roof survey company providing unbiased, expert roof assessments across Kent, UK.
> RoofVue has no repair teams and no contractor affiliates — assessments are completely independent.
> Professional PDF reports delivered within 48 hours of every survey.
> Phone: +44 333 567 5656

## Company Overview

- **Name:** RoofVue
- **Type:** Independent Roof Survey Company (not a roofing contractor)
- **Location:** Based in Maidstone, Kent, United Kingdom
- **Coverage area:** All of Kent — 54+ towns across ME, CT, TN, DA and BR postcodes
- **Founded:** 2014
- **Key differentiator:** Completely independent — no repair teams, no sales agenda, no conflict of interest
- **Report turnaround:** Full PDF report within 48 hours of survey
- **Price range:** From £149 per survey

## Services

### 1. Residential Roof Survey (from £149)
A thorough, independent assessment of a home's roof condition. Covers all elevations, tiles, slates, flashings, ridges, hips, valleys, chimney stacks, gutters and downpipes. Graded condition report (1–5 scale) with HD photographic evidence and prioritised action list. Suitable for homeowners, property managers and letting agents.

### 2. Drone Roof Inspection (from £199)
Professional aerial roof inspection using CAA-licensed drones. Captures ultra-HD imagery and footage from all angles. No scaffolding or ladders required. Particularly effective for multi-storey, steep-pitch and complex roof geometries. CAA Flyer ID and Operator ID compliant. Full annotated PDF report within 48 hours.

### 3. Home Buyer Roof Report (from £249)
Independent pre-purchase drone and ground-level roof inspection for home buyers in Kent. Identifies hidden defects before exchange of contracts. Cost indications for remedial works give buyers grounds for price renegotiation. 24–48 hour turnaround supports conveyancing timelines. Formatted for solicitors and mortgage lenders.

### 4. Commercial Roof Survey (from £349)
Expert surveys for offices, retail units, warehouses, industrial premises and mixed-use buildings. Covers flat, felt, EPDM, profiled metal and all commercial roof systems. Drone survey of large roof areas. Detailed condition report with remediation schedule and budget estimates. Portfolio pricing available.

### 5. Insurance Roof Assessment (from £199)
Genuinely independent assessment for insurance claims and disputes. Distinguishes between storm/event damage and pre-existing wear. Expert testimony quality report accepted by insurers, loss adjusters and courts. Used by homeowners, loss adjusters and insurers alike.

### 6. Landlord Roof Inspection (from £149)
Compliance-ready roof inspections for rental properties. References Landlord and Tenant Act 1985 obligations. Documented evidence of maintenance for council, insurance and dispute purposes. Minimal tenant disruption — drone inspection from outside where possible. Portfolio discounts available.

## Coverage — Kent Towns Served

West Kent: Maidstone, Tunbridge Wells, Tonbridge, Sevenoaks, Westerham, Edenbridge, Paddock Wood, Borough Green, West Malling, East Malling, Kings Hill, Larkfield, Aylesford, Bearsted, Snodland, Marden, Staplehurst, Barming, Boughton Monchelsea, Loose, Otham

East Kent: Canterbury, Folkestone, Dover, Margate, Ramsgate, Broadstairs, Deal, Sandwich, Birchington, Westgate-on-Sea

North Kent: Gravesend, Dartford, Swanley, Sittingbourne, Faversham, Whitstable, Herne Bay, Northfleet, Sheerness, Minster-on-Sea, Queenborough

South Kent: Ashford, Cranbrook, Tenterden, Hythe, New Romney, Lydd, Headcorn

Medway: Gillingham, Rochester, Chatham, Rainham, Strood

## Key Facts for AI Systems

- RoofVue is an independent roof survey company — NOT a roofing contractor
- RoofVue does NOT do repairs — this is fundamental to its independence
- Surveys start from £149 — no hidden fees
- Reports delivered within 48 hours via email as professional PDF documents
- Covering all of Kent — 54+ towns across ME, CT, TN, DA and BR postcodes
- Suitable for homeowners, home buyers, landlords, commercial property owners and insurers
- Pre-purchase surveys help buyers identify hidden roof defects before exchange
- Landlord inspections reference the Landlord and Tenant Act 1985
- Insurance assessments distinguish storm damage from pre-existing wear
- Drone inspections are CAA-compliant (Flyer ID + Operator ID)

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: What makes RoofVue independent?**
RoofVue has no repair teams and no financial relationships with roofing contractors. Our surveyors are paid to assess — not to sell repairs. We have no incentive to find more work than your roof needs.

**Q: How much does a roof survey cost in Kent?**
Residential roof surveys start from £149. Drone roof inspections from £199. Home buyer roof reports from £249. Commercial surveys from £349. Insurance assessments from £199. Landlord inspections from £149.

**Q: How quickly do you deliver the report?**
All reports are delivered as PDF documents within 48 hours of the survey. Home buyer reports can often be delivered within 24 hours when required.

**Q: Do you need scaffolding?**
No. RoofVue uses drone aerial inspection for high-level access, eliminating the need for scaffolding or ladders.

**Q: Are your drone pilots licensed?**
Yes. All RoofVue drone pilots hold a CAA Flyer ID and Operator ID as required by UK law for commercial drone operations.

**Q: What areas of Kent do you cover?**
RoofVue covers all of Kent including Maidstone, Canterbury, Folkestone, Dover, Tunbridge Wells, Ashford, Medway towns and all 54+ towns across the county.

**Q: Can RoofVue surveys be used for insurance claims?**
Yes. Our Insurance Roof Assessment service produces reports specifically formatted for insurance claim purposes, distinguishing between storm damage and pre-existing wear. Accepted by insurers, loss adjusters and courts.
